description: Build a vivid behavioral and psychographic portrait of a target audience — language, emotions, barriers, triggers, and identity
usage: who is the customer, audience portrait, customer psychology, how do they talk, buyer persona, what makes them buy, audience insight, customer language

target.description: The audience to profile (e.g., 'skincare-curious millennial men', 'first-time founders', 'budget-conscious parents')

focus.description: Narrow to a specific aspect: 'language', 'barriers', 'triggers', 'identity', or 'all'

findings.description: Upstream research findings from chained modules
